'''ngachasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:graben|graben]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graben|graben]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngachasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæchæshæth|ngæchæshæth]] || [[word:ngæchæshæj|ngæchæshæj]] || [[word:ngæchæshæsh|ngæchæshæsh]] || [[word:ngæchæshæ|ngæchæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachachashath|ngachachashath]] || [[word:ngachachashaj|ngachachashaj]] || [[word:ngachachashash|ngachachashash]] || [[word:ngachachasha|ngachachasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngachashath|ngachashath]] || [[word:ngachashaj|ngachashaj]] || [[word:ngachashash|ngachashash]] || [[word:ngachasha|ngachasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachafshath|ngachafshath]] || [[word:ngachafshaj|ngachafshaj]] || [[word:ngachafshash|ngachafshash]] || [[word:ngachafshaf|ngachafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngachashatha|ngachashatha]] || [[word:ngachashaja|ngachashaja]] || [[word:ngachashasha|ngachashasha]] || [[word:ngachashaka|ngachashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngachashath|ngachashath]] || [[word:ngachashaj|ngachashaj]] || [[word:ngachashash|ngachashash]] || [[word:ngachasha|ngachasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngachashathal|ngachashathal]] || [[word:ngachashajal|ngachashajal]] || [[word:ngachashashal|ngachashashal]] || [[word:ngachashakal|ngachashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngachashathatha|ngachashathatha]] || [[word:ngachashajaja|ngachashajaja]] || [[word:ngachashashasha|ngachashashasha]] || [[word:ngachashaka|ngachashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngachashathan|ngachashathan]] || [[word:ngachashajan|ngachashajan]] || [[word:ngachashashan|ngachashashan]] || [[word:ngachashakan|ngachashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngachashathaoro|ngachashathaoro]] || [[word:ngachashajaoro|ngachashajaoro]] || [[word:ngachashashaoro|ngachashashaoro]] || [[word:ngachashakaoro|ngachashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
